healthReason: KE-5 COMPLETE (PR #1400 merged). New P0 PR #1414 (no-self-approve-pr) open, CI in progress — not blocking but unresolved. Worktree build failure at session start (missing pnpm workspace symlinks) — different class than #1376 but same governance blindspot category. #1402 (worker pool dead) is cross-squad P0, monitored. Invariant coverage at 50% — below 75% target, 8 dormant invariants need wiring audit. Health yellow due to: build failure on startup + P0 PR in-flight.
summary: KE-5 fully closed this cycle. PR #1400 (claudeHookWrapper template probe, closes second vector of #1376) merged — confirmed via gh. Issue #1376 state: CLOSED. Sprint KE-5 done. New sprint KE-6 assigned: invariant coverage hardening (fix governance-self-modification read-only FP, cross-repo-blast-radius, dormant invariant audit). First-party dogfood: this EM run started with a build failure — pnpm workspace symlinks missing in apps/cli/node_modules/@red-codes/ (different root cause than #1376: pnpm install not run in worktree, not ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND at runtime). Fixed by running pnpm install --frozen-lockfile. Bootstrap guard `test -d node_modules` insufficient — node_modules existed but workspace symlinks were absent. Analytics-invariant-researcher filed #1407 (invariant coverage 50%, 12 dormant, 5 recs) and #1408 (governance-self-modification blocks read-only SQLite). PR #1414 (no-self-approve-pr P0 invariant, 16 tests) opened by coder, CI in progress. Closed stale conflicting PR #1396.

newIssueToFile.title: feat(invariants): cross-repo-blast-radius invariant
newIssueToFile.body: Identified by analytics-invariant-researcher (#1407 Rec 4). Per-repo blast radius is 20 files; aggregate across repos in a session is unbounded. An agent touching 3 repos at 15 files each = 45 files, all under the per-repo limit but collectively high-impact. Requires session-level cross-repo file tracking (session ID already available). Severity 4. Label: priority:P1, squad:kernel.

dogfoodObservations.description: SESSION STARTUP BUILD FAILURE: This EM run (kernel-em-385392) started with a failing pnpm build. Root cause: apps/cli/node_modules/@red-codes/ workspace symlinks missing — pnpm install had not been run in this worktree after creation. The root node_modules/ directory existed (dev deps present), so bootstrap guard `test -d node_modules` passed silently. Fixed by running pnpm install --frozen-lockfile.
dogfoodObservations.classification: Same class as #1376 (worktree package resolution failure) but different root cause: missing symlinks vs ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND. #1376 is closed; this variant may need a follow-up or the bootstrap guard should be strengthened.
dogfoodObservations.proposedFix: Bootstrap guard should check for workspace package resolution, not just directory existence. Suggestion: probe `node -e "require('@red-codes/core')" 2>/dev/null` in apps/cli after pnpm install step, or check for presence of apps/cli/node_modules/@red-codes/ explicitly.

dogfoodObservations.description: no-governance-self-modification invariant blocking read-only SQLite analytics access — confirmed first-party (#1408). This EM run would have triggered the same block if it had queried agentguard.db during triage. KE-6 target.
